name: Progress-comparison taxonomy amendment (NDEBT-022)

design_notes.what_this_feature_is: Phase-006 F-057: amend the LIVE ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md (0.1.1 -> 0.2.0) to complete its finding-state taxonomy so a real corpus classifies without workarounds. Section 3 adds the fifth transition class `persisting` (present on both sides and still open, with evidence freshly re-confirmed at/after the later execution's anchors -- the exact opposite of `stale`; carried, never a source of score movement). Section 3.1 adds the pre-window-resolved recording rule (a finding resolved before the earlier input's own reference point is recorded with its closure evidence but is NOT a cross-execution transition and is excluded from the open-findings score; `resolved` is reserved for an in-window closure). Section 3.2 adds the first-comparison rule (an empty `reopened` bucket on a first-ever comparison is correct). Section 6.1 fixes the score-count semantics: the open-findings score counts `open` findings only, never resolved or pre-window-resolved recorded findings. Section 1/7 'four'->'five' transition classes; frontmatter description + change_log updated.
design_notes.audit_044_mapping: The amendment is motivated by and validated against audit-044 (the framework's first real comparison), whose committed delta bridged two gaps via unchanged_facts + prose notes. Under the amended taxonomy the five findings classify directly: F-audit044-ndebt-015 (open, re-confirmed this run) -> `persisting`; F-audit044-ndebt-002 (resolved 2026-07-10, before baseline #1's 2026-07-17 capture) -> pre-window-resolved (recorded, not a transition); F-audit044-ndebt-016 (stale evidence) -> `stale`; F-audit044-ndebt-017/018 -> `new`. The open-findings score is open-only 2->4 (015,016 -> 015,016,017,018; the resolved 002 excluded), with the +2 attributable to the two `new` findings -- exactly the movement the committed delta reported, now derivable without unchanged_facts.
design_notes.immutability_note: AH-3: the committed audit-2026-07-17-cba6422 artifacts (delta.json, findings.json, report.md) are NOT touched -- they honestly recorded the corpus under the old taxonomy with transparent notes, and stay immutable. The amendment binds FUTURE comparisons; E06 asserts zero change under .agent/audits/.
design_notes.next_feature_decision: The operator directed 'Rebase line approved' + 'Option 1' (2026-07-19), authorizing a Section-6/9 scope-budget re-baseline (original_estimate_lines 1720 -> 2300, ceiling 2236 -> 2990; recorded structurally in scope_budget.rebaselines in the separate commit 085e568) AND choosing to proceed with feature 057. So 057 is operator-selected, not abort-driven. The re-baseline gives the phase tail headroom without a mid-phase §6 halt.
design_notes.process_honesty: Single-session collapsed-role execution, disclosed-and-permitted by the AGF Orchestrator clause. The re-baseline is committed separately (085e568) as an Orchestrator coordination action before this feature's work, per NDEBT-018 (gate/coordination decisions committed to durable state promptly). E01/E07 anchor to the phase base 964fe48 (not HEAD~1), since the re-baseline commit sits between the base and this deliverable; E09 dogfoods the NDEBT-019 rc-capture rule.

files_modify.purpose: 0.2.0: add the fifth `persisting` transition class (Section 3), the pre-window-resolved recording rule (3.1), the first-comparison rule (3.2), and the open-vs-recorded score-count semantics (6.1); Section 1/7 four->five; frontmatter description + change_log.
0.26.0: NDEBT-022 Open -> Resolved with the resolution note.
[Unreleased] Added: the progress-comparison taxonomy completion entry.

non_goals: No change to the committed audit-2026-07-17-cba6422 delta/findings/report artifacts -- they are immutable (AH-3); the amendment binds future comparisons only.
No new audit_delta.schema.json -- it remains a deferred, optional schema (product_spec_005 Section 2.3); this feature amends the protocol's prose semantics, not the JSON Schema.

No change to the meaning of the four existing transition classes (new/resolved/reopened/stale) beyond the `resolved` clarification (in-window closure) that the pre-window-resolved rule requires; no change to Sections 2, 4, 5, 8.
No change to any other ecosystem/ document or to the score weighting/thresholds a consumer defines on top of this protocol.

verification.acceptance_test: ANTI-VACUITY (phase base 964fe48 = the F-054 merge / PR #34): at the base ecosystem/07 was 0.1.1 with four transition classes and no `persisting`, Section 3.1/3.2, or Section 6.1.
verification.command:
set -e
git show 964fe48:ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md | grep -Fq 'version: 0.1.1'
git show 964fe48:ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md | grep -Fq 'exactly one of four transition classes'
if git show 964fe48:ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md | grep -Fq '`persisting`'; then echo 'VACUITY: persisting already at base'; exit 1; fi
if git show 964fe48:ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md | grep -Fq '3.1 Pre-Window-Resolved'; then echo 'VACUITY: 3.1 already at base'; exit 1; fi
echo 'E01 PASS: at base 964fe48 ecosystem/07 was 0.1.1 with four transition classes, no persisting / 3.1 / 3.2 / 6.1 (anti-vacuity)'

verification.acceptance_test: PERSISTING CLASS DEFINED: Section 3 now classifies into five transition classes and defines `persisting` as present-on-both-sides with CURRENT (freshly re-confirmed) evidence -- the exact opposite of `stale`.
verification.command:
set -e
grep -Fq 'exactly one of five transition classes' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq '`persisting` -- present in both executions and still open' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq 'exact opposite of `stale`' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq 'carried, not moved' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
echo 'E02 PASS: Section 3 defines the fifth class persisting (present-on-both, current evidence, opposite of stale)'

verification.acceptance_test: PRE-WINDOW-RESOLVED + FIRST-COMPARISON RULES: Section 3.1 records a pre-window-resolved finding without counting it as a transition or in the open score; Section 3.2 states an empty reopened bucket on a first comparison is correct.
verification.command:
set -e
grep -Fq '### 3.1 Pre-Window-Resolved Findings' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq 'is NOT assigned' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq 'reserved for an in-window closure' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq '### 3.2 First-Comparison Rule' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq 'reopened` class' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
echo 'E03 PASS: Section 3.1 pre-window-resolved recording rule + Section 3.2 first-comparison rule present'

verification.acceptance_test: SCORE-COUNT SEMANTICS: Section 6.1 specifies the open-findings score counts `open` findings only -- never resolved or pre-window-resolved recorded findings.
verification.command:
set -e
grep -Fq '### 6.1 Open-Findings Count Semantics' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq 'counts findings in' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq 'open-findings score of four, not five' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
echo 'E04 PASS: Section 6.1 fixes the open-vs-recorded score-count semantics (open-only)'

verification.acceptance_test: AUDIT-044 CLASSIFIES CLEANLY (the acceptance test): all five audit-044 findings map to an amended class (015 persisting, 002 pre-window-resolved, 016 stale, 017/018 new) with open-only score 2->4, without recourse to the unchanged_facts workaround.
verification.command:
set -e
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
doc = open('ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md').read()
for tok in ['`new`','`resolved`','`reopened`','`persisting`','`stale`','### 3.1 Pre-Window-Resolved','### 3.2 First-Comparison','### 6.1 Open-Findings Count']:
    assert tok in doc, 'doc missing: ' + tok
raw = json.load(open('.agent/audits/audit-2026-07-17-cba6422/findings.json'))
findings = raw if isinstance(raw, list) else raw['findings']
by = {f['id']: f for f in findings}
amended = {'F-audit044-ndebt-015':'persisting','F-audit044-ndebt-002':'pre-window-resolved','F-audit044-ndebt-016':'stale','F-audit044-ndebt-017':'new','F-audit044-ndebt-018':'new'}
assert set(by) == set(amended), sorted(by)
assert by['F-audit044-ndebt-015']['status'] == 'open'     # present-both, re-confirmed -> persisting
assert by['F-audit044-ndebt-002']['status'] == 'resolved' # pre-baseline-1 -> pre-window-resolved (recorded, not a transition)
open_before = {'F-audit044-ndebt-015','F-audit044-ndebt-016'}
open_after  = {'F-audit044-ndebt-015','F-audit044-ndebt-016','F-audit044-ndebt-017','F-audit044-ndebt-018'}
assert len(open_before) == 2 and len(open_after) == 4, 'open-only score must be 2->4 (002 resolved, excluded)'
print('audit-044 classifies cleanly:', amended)
PY
echo 'E05 PASS: all 5 audit-044 findings classify under the amended taxonomy; open-only 2->4; no unchanged_facts needed'

verification.acceptance_test: AUDIT-044 IMMUTABLE (AH-3): the committed audit-2026-07-17-cba6422 delta/findings/report artifacts are byte-identical to the base -- the amendment binds FUTURE comparisons, the historical delta stays untouched.
verification.command:
set -e
test -z "$(git diff --name-only 964fe48..HEAD -- .agent/audits/)"
echo 'E06 PASS: the committed audit-2026-07-17-cba6422 artifacts are unchanged (immutable)'

verification.acceptance_test: DELIVERABLE CONFINEMENT: the non-.agent changes across the branch (base 964fe48..HEAD) are exactly the three contracted files.
verification.command:
set -e
changed=$(git diff --name-only 964fe48..HEAD | grep -v '^.agent/' | LC_ALL=C sort | tr '\n' ' ')
test "$changed" = 'CHANGELOG.md docs/planning/DEBT.md ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md '
echo 'E07 PASS: non-.agent changes across the branch are exactly the 3 deliverable files'

verification.acceptance_test: DOCS/DEBT SYNCED: ecosystem/07 0.2.0 with a matching change_log (NDS Sec 7); DEBT 0.26.0 has NDEBT-022 in Resolved (not Open); CHANGELOG [Unreleased] names the F-057 entry.
verification.command:
set -e
grep -Fq 'version: 0.2.0' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq 'Feature 057 (NDEBT-022)' ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md
grep -Fq 'version: 0.26.0' docs/planning/DEBT.md
python3 - <<'PY'
import re
sect=None; resolved=set(); openset=set()
for l in open('docs/planning/DEBT.md'):
    if l.startswith('## Open'): sect='open'
    elif l.startswith('## Resolved'): sect='resolved'
    m=re.match(r'\| (NDEBT-\d+) ', l)
    if m and sect=='resolved': resolved.add(m.group(1))
    if m and sect=='open': openset.add(m.group(1))
assert 'NDEBT-022' in resolved and 'NDEBT-022' not in openset, 'NDEBT-022 not Resolved'
print('debt ok')
PY
sed -n '/## \[Unreleased\]/,/## \[0.7.0\]/p' CHANGELOG.md | grep -Fq 'Progress-comparison taxonomy completion'
echo 'E08 PASS: ecosystem/07 0.2.0 (change_log synced); DEBT 0.26.0 (NDEBT-022 Resolved); CHANGELOG names F-057'

verification.acceptance_test: REGRESSION BUNDLE (dogfoods NDEBT-019 rc-capture): validator sweep 13/13, payload 11/11, self-test 46/46, e2e green -- each with explicit exit-code capture.
verification.command:
set -e
out=$(bash tools/validate.sh 2>&1); rc=$?; test $rc -eq 0; printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -1 | grep -Fxq 'SUMMARY: 13 passed, 0 failed'
out=$(bash tools/validate.sh --payload 2>&1); rc=$?; test $rc -eq 0; printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -1 | grep -Fxq 'SUMMARY (payload mode): 11 passed, 0 failed'
out=$(bash tools/fixtures_self_test.sh 2>&1); rc=$?; test $rc -eq 0; printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -1 | grep -Fxq 'SELF-TEST OK: 46/46 fixtures accounted for, 0 failed'
bash tools/e2e_bootstrap_test.sh >/dev/null 2>&1
echo 'E09 PASS: sweep 13/13, payload 11/11, self-test 46/46 (rc=0 each); e2e green'

evidence_convention: Each verification command's captured output is in .agent/evidence/057-verify-NN.txt (9 entries), plus the consolidated .agent/evidence/057/verification.txt (9 EXIT:0 markers) and .agent/evidence/057/diff.patch (git diff 964fe48..HEAD). Commands run from the repo root; anti-vacuity (E01) and confinement (E07) anchor to the phase base 964fe48 (the F-054 merge), since the operator-authorized re-baseline commit 085e568 sits between the base and this deliverable.

approvals.process_note: Operator-selected feature (directive 'Rebase line approved' + 'Option 1'); the accompanying Section-6/9 re-baseline is recorded in the separate coordination commit 085e568. The 9-entry suite executed live with captured evidence (dogfooding NDEBT-019 rc-capture); QA record .agent/qa/057.json documents the independent re-run. A LIVE ecosystem-doc amendment; the committed audit-044 corpus stays immutable (E06).
